_meta.description: Escape sequence protocol for native terminal progress bar rendering. Originally created by ConEmu, adopted by Windows Terminal, iTerm2, Ghostty, Konsole, and mintty. Not a character-based progress bar but a terminal-level progress indicator.

2.name: Error
2.description: Show error state, optionally with progress value

4.name: Warning
4.description: Show warning state with progress value

terminal_support.name: ConEmu
terminal_support.notes: Originator of the protocol. Shows in taskbar and tab title.

terminal_support.name: Ghostty
terminal_support.notes: Since v1.2.0. Renders native GUI bar at top of terminal.

terminal_support.name: mintty
terminal_support.notes: Since v3.4.2 (Nov 2020). Also supports mnemonic params.
